Apply ALL of the following 8 fixes to this file:

### Fix 1
Lines: 19, 40
Rule [sd-css-dead-class-pf-v5-c-select]:
The CSS class 'pf-v5-c-select' was removed in the new version. A simple version prefix swap to 'pf-v6-c-select' does NOT produce a valid class — this class does not exist in the target CSS distribution.

Remove this class reference or replace it with appropriate custom CSS or a PatternFly component prop.

Incident context:
  matchingText: ul.pf-v5-c-select__menu.pf-m-static

This rule affects multiple locations in the file. Apply ALL steps together as one logical change.

Instructions:
1. Read the file at /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260608T145537/kubevirt-plugin/source/cypress/views/selector-instance.ts
2. Process each fix INDEPENDENTLY in sequence. For each fix:
   a. Identify the exact code affected (line number and affected element)
   b. Determine the specific change needed (add/remove/rename identifiers, update references)
   c. Track all changes for the final write
3. Make the minimum edits necessary — do not change unrelated code, but DO clean up any artifacts caused by your changes (e.g., remove imports that are no longer referenced, delete dead declarations)
4. After determining your changes, reason through any functional side effects: verify that your edits preserve the existing behavior of the surrounding code. If a migration change makes existing variables, state, or logic redundant, clean up the affected code so the file remains correct and consistent.
5. Do NOT revert any changes that were already applied in previous passes
6. Write the fixed file once with ALL changes from every fix applied
7. REQUIRED: If companion test files are listed above, read EACH one now. Do NOT skip this step. For each test file, check whether your changes to the main file would cause test failures (e.g., portal rendering means getByText/getByRole won't find dropdown content, renamed attributes break selectors). If a test would break, apply the fix and write the updated test file.


Before writing, reason through each fix step by step to ensure nothing is missed. Then read the file, make the edits, and write it.

After writing the file, produce a '## Changes Applied' section that lists each change you made, each fix that was already applied (no change needed), and each fix you could not apply (with a brief reason). This summary is used by subsequent processing steps.
I'll start by reading the file to understand its current content.

Now let me analyze each fix:

**Line 19:** `export const instanceValue = 'ul.pf-v5-c-select__menu.pf-m-static';`
- Fixes 1, 2, 5, 6 all target this line. The CSS classes `pf-v5-c-select`, `pf-v5-c-select__menu` are removed with no v6 equivalent. In PF v6, the Select component uses the Menu component internally. The equivalent CSS selector for a static menu list would be `ul.pf-v6-c-menu__list`.

**Line 40:** `export const selectSecret = '.pf-v5-c-select__toggle-text';`
- Fixes 1, 3, 4, 5, 7, 8 all target this line. The CSS classes `pf-v5-c-select__toggle-text` and its parent `pf-v5-c-select__toggle` are removed with no v6 equivalent. In PF v6, the Select component uses MenuToggle. The equivalent for toggle text is `.pf-v6-c-menu-toggle__text`.

These are Cypress selectors used for testing. The PF v5 Select component was replaced by the PF v6 Select which uses Menu/MenuToggle internally. The appropriate replacements are:
- `pf-v5-c-select__menu` + `pf-m-static` → `pf-v6-c-menu__list` (the menu list)
- `pf-v5-c-select__toggle-text` → `pf-v6-c-menu-toggle__text` (already used on line 12)
Now let me verify the final state of the file:

The file looks correct. All v5 Select CSS classes have been replaced with their v6 equivalents.

## Changes Applied

| Fix | Rule | Status | Detail |
|-----|------|--------|--------|
| Fix 1 | `sd-css-dead-class-pf-v5-c-select` | **Applied** | Line 19: replaced `ul.pf-v5-c-select__menu.pf-m-static` → `ul.pf-v6-c-menu__list` (PF v6 Select uses Menu internally). Line 40: replaced `.pf-v5-c-select__toggle-text` → `.pf-v6-c-menu-toggle__text` (PF v6 Select uses MenuToggle). |
| Fix 2 | `sd-css-dead-class-pf-v5-c-select-menu` | **Applied** | Line 19: `pf-v5-c-select__menu` → `pf-v6-c-menu__list` (same edit as Fix 1). |
| Fix 3 | `sd-css-dead-class-pf-v5-c-select-toggle` | **Applied** | Line 40: `pf-v5-c-select__toggle-text` → `pf-v6-c-menu-toggle__text` (same edit as Fix 1). |
| Fix 4 | `sd-css-dead-class-pf-v5-c-select-toggle-text` | **Applied** | Line 40: same edit as Fix 3. |
| Fix 5 | `semver-css-class-removed-c-select` | **Applied** | Lines 19 & 40: same edits as Fix 1 (duplicate rule from different detector). |
| Fix 6 | `semver-css-class-removed-c-select-menu` | **Applied** | Line 19: same edit as Fix 2 (duplicate rule). |
| Fix 7 | `semver-css-class-removed-c-select-toggle` | **Applied** | Line 40: same edit as Fix 3 (duplicate rule). |
| Fix 8 | `semver-css-class-removed-c-select-toggle-text` | **Applied** | Line 40: same edit as Fix 4 (duplicate rule). |

**Summary:** All 8 fixes applied via 2 line edits. The removed PF v5 Select CSS classes were replaced with their PF v6 equivalents — `pf-v5-c-select__menu` → `pf-v6-c-menu__list` (the Select now uses the Menu component internally) and `pf-v5-c-select__toggle-text` → `pf-v6-c-menu-toggle__text` (the Select now uses MenuToggle). The `.pf-m-static` modifier was dropped as it has no equivalent on the v6 menu list. Note that `selectSecret` on line 40 now uses the same class as `toggleText` on line 12 (`.pf-v6-c-menu-toggle__text`), which is correct — both are CSS selectors targeting menu toggle text elements.

chunks.response:
The file looks correct. All v5 Select CSS classes have been replaced with their v6 equivalents.

## Changes Applied

| Fix | Rule | Status | Detail |
|-----|------|--------|--------|
| Fix 1 | `sd-css-dead-class-pf-v5-c-select` | **Applied** | Line 19: replaced `ul.pf-v5-c-select__menu.pf-m-static` → `ul.pf-v6-c-menu__list` (PF v6 Select uses Menu internally). Line 40: replaced `.pf-v5-c-select__toggle-text` → `.pf-v6-c-menu-toggle__text` (PF v6 Select uses MenuToggle). |
| Fix 2 | `sd-css-dead-class-pf-v5-c-select-menu` | **Applied** | Line 19: `pf-v5-c-select__menu` → `pf-v6-c-menu__list` (same edit as Fix 1). |
| Fix 3 | `sd-css-dead-class-pf-v5-c-select-toggle` | **Applied** | Line 40: `pf-v5-c-select__toggle-text` → `pf-v6-c-menu-toggle__text` (same edit as Fix 1). |
| Fix 4 | `sd-css-dead-class-pf-v5-c-select-toggle-text` | **Applied** | Line 40: same edit as Fix 3. |
| Fix 5 | `semver-css-class-removed-c-select` | **Applied** | Lines 19 & 40: same edits as Fix 1 (duplicate rule from different detector). |
| Fix 6 | `semver-css-class-removed-c-select-menu` | **Applied** | Line 19: same edit as Fix 2 (duplicate rule). |
| Fix 7 | `semver-css-class-removed-c-select-toggle` | **Applied** | Line 40: same edit as Fix 3 (duplicate rule). |
| Fix 8 | `semver-css-class-removed-c-select-toggle-text` | **Applied** | Line 40: same edit as Fix 4 (duplicate rule). |

**Summary:** All 8 fixes applied via 2 line edits. The removed PF v5 Select CSS classes were replaced with their PF v6 equivalents — `pf-v5-c-select__menu` → `pf-v6-c-menu__list` (the Select now uses the Menu component internally) and `pf-v5-c-select__toggle-text` → `pf-v6-c-menu-toggle__text` (the Select now uses MenuToggle). The `.pf-m-static` modifier was dropped as it has no equivalent on the v6 menu list. Note that `selectSecret` on line 40 now uses the same class as `toggleText` on line 12 (`.pf-v6-c-menu-toggle__text`), which is correct — both are CSS selectors targeting menu toggle text elements.
